title: Familien Olsen
writer: Oluf Bang, Fleming Lynge, Svend Rindom
actors: Osvald Helmuth, Maria Garland, Berthe Qvistgaard
plot: Greengrocer Olsen is called for jury duty in a case against a CEO. It burdens him extra finding out his son stole DKK500 from the CEO's company and his daughter is secretly dating the CEO's son.
